keywords.ground_truth: Botox is a neurotoxin (botulinum toxin type A) injected in small doses to temporarily relax facial muscles, reducing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. Results typically last 3–6 months.
The average cost of Botox is $10–$15 per unit. A typical forehead treatment uses 20–30 units, making the total cost $200–$450 per session. Prices vary by provider and location.
Botox is administered by licensed medical professionals including dermatologists, plastic surgeons, and certified medical spas. Always verify provider credentials before treatment.
Common Botox side effects include temporary bruising, swelling, and headache at the injection site. Rare side effects include drooping eyelids or asymmetry, which resolve as the product wears off.
